'''Salibury''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]].

In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Dennix Graeber]] [[Crackdown on Ralltiir|cracked]] a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] ring with an armory in the center of Salibury's commercial district. Graeber seized three hundred tons of weaponry, and authorities captured thirty-five Rebels on-site, leading to the capture of roughly another hundred through interrogations and examination of documents captured in the raid.
